title: AutoFeedBreed
description: Minecraft mod for automatic animal feeding and breeding
body:
**AutoFeedBreed** is a server-side Fabric mod that lets animals feed and breed on their own using nearby fully grown crops.

## What It Does
- Animals eat nearby fully grown crops
- Crops are automatically replanted after eating
- Animals breed on their own
- Baby animals are prevented from eating crops until they grow up
- The cycle repeats automatically

## Features
- **Server-side only**
- **Supports vanilla and modded animals and crops**
- **Configurable via `autofeedbreed.json`**
  - Define crop types per animal  
  - Customize breed cooldowns
- **Safe for existing worlds**

> **Requires Fabric API**
